blockingIssues.description: `internal/connectors/common.go` allows `looksLikePDF` to trust `Content-Type: application/pdf` without confirming the body is actually a PDF, so record-dependent retrieval can save and report success for mislabeled HTML/error responses.

`internal/connectors/fallback.go` swallows Sci-Hub request/transport failures by returning a zero-value retrieval result with no error, which can emit an invalid empty retrieval state and hide real upstream failure details.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented the emitted retrieval `winning_stage` field in the shared output contract.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a verification-only path for reassigned features that are already implemented so workers can explicitly validate and hand off without inventing tests-first edits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `implement-native-fulltext-and-record-dependent-retrieval` noted that `.factory/skills/go-connector-worker/SKILL.md` requires test-first implementation steps even when a reassigned feature is already present in the tree, and the worker handoff recorded a justified procedure deviation during re-validation.
